description_en: Essaouira, in Morocco, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.4/5. Muslim travelers will find 32 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
